evidence_objects.description: 40.3s code graph upgraded with multi-package import resolution. Resolved 3614 IMPORTS (2197 cross-app, 1417 intra-app) from 16046 total relationships. dcim/models/__init__.py identified as most-imported file (160 inbound). Cross-domain coupling map produced: extras->netbox (117), extras->utilities (108), dcim->netbox (106), dcim->utilities (102). Centrality: 31 RE_EXPORT_HUB, 694 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY, 364 VALIDATION_SUPPORT.

hero_moments.discovery: DCIM gravitational dominance: dcim/models/__init__.py at 160 inbound imports exceeds core (114) + extras (95) combined. Appears as peer app in docs, structurally is the foundation.

60.8% cross-domain import rate: 2,197 of 3,614 imports cross app boundaries. Django app structure implies modularity; PI reveals majority of imports are cross-app. Apparent modularity is organizational fiction.
Bidirectional DCIM-IPAM entanglement: 30 DCIM->IPAM + 28 IPAM->DCIM = 58 bidirectional imports. Domains appear separate in docs and UI but cannot be independently versioned, tested, or extracted.

Choice enumerations as coupling multipliers: dcim/choices.py at 76 inbound imports; 4 choices files totaling 203 combined inbound. Small enumeration files (~50-200 lines) have disproportionate structural influence.

Pipeline self-improvement through live onboarding: source root discovery (21->1,155 files) and cross-app import resolution (580->3,614 imports) exposed by first real multi-app Django project. Flask testing could not reveal these.

Dual structural authority — import graph vs inheritance graph reveal different hierarchies. Import authority: dcim dominates (189 cross-domain edges) — vocabulary/data coupling. Inheritance authority: tenancy dominates (226 cross-domain edges, 2.22x its import authority) — behavioral composition via forms, tables, filtersets, GraphQL mixins. Tenancy is documented as optional organizational metadata but structurally provides the behavioral framework that ALL domain apps inherit. Every domain's forms, filters, and tables inherit from tenancy. dcim tells domains WHAT to reference; tenancy tells domains HOW to behave. Consumer domains (circuits, virtualization, vpn, wireless) have zero inheritance authority — they only inherit, never provide.

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (CENTRALITY): DCIM gravitational dominance: dcim/models/__init__.py at 160 inbound imports exceeds core (114) + extras (95) combined. Appears as peer app in docs, structurally is the foundation.
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (CENTRALITY). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): DCIM gravitational dominance cross-validated: STRUCTURAL_DOMINANCE propositions confirm CEU-DCIM as dominant structural node. Authority enrichment confirms 444 AST authority edges (largest of 12 CEUs), VIEW-dominant at 303 edges. The centrality observation (160 inbound imports > core + extras combined) aligns with systematic evidence from both coupling and authority dimensions.

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (COUPLING): 60.8% cross-domain import rate: 2,197 of 3,614 imports cross app boundaries. Django app structure implies modularity; PI reveals majority of imports are cross-app. Apparent modularity is organizationa
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (COUPLING). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): 60.8% cross-domain coupling rate cross-validated: 34 COUPLING_PATTERN propositions at DIRECT_EVIDENCE tier (0.956 mean confidence) systematically cover the same structural phenomenon this hero moment observes. Per-CEU bidirectional entanglement data confirms pervasive cross-app coupling. The "organizational fiction" observation is grounded in the structural gap between Django app packaging and measured coupling topology.

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (COUPLING): Bidirectional DCIM-IPAM entanglement: 30 DCIM->IPAM + 28 IPAM->DCIM = 58 bidirectional imports. Domains appear separate in docs and UI but cannot be independently versioned, tested, or extracted.
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (COUPLING). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): DCIM-IPAM bidirectional entanglement cross-validated: COUPLING_PATTERN propositions for CEU-DCIM and CEU-IPAM confirm bidirectional coupling with specific edge counts. The 58-edge bidirectional import relationship is a specific instance of the systematic coupling pattern evidence. Authority enrichment adds: DCIM=444 authority edges, IPAM=60 authority edges (MODEL-dominant, zero VIEW — structurally distinct authority profiles confirming complementary rather than redundant coupling).

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (CENTRALITY): Choice enumerations as coupling multipliers: dcim/choices.py at 76 inbound imports; 4 choices files totaling 203 combined inbound. Small enumeration files (~50-200 lines) have disproportionate structu
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (CENTRALITY). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): Choice enumeration coupling multipliers partially cross-validated: Centrality data (76 inbound imports for dcim/choices.py, 203 combined across 4 files) is verifiable from structural evidence. COUPLING_PATTERN data confirms that cross-domain imports include these enumeration references. The "coupling multiplier" characterization is observational but structurally grounded — small files with disproportionate inbound centrality is a measurable structural property. Confidence set below other reconciled hero moments because the multiplier interpretation extends beyond raw measurement.

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (EMERGENCE): Pipeline self-improvement through live onboarding: source root discovery (21->1,155 files) and cross-app import resolution (580->3,614 imports) exposed by first real multi-app Django project. Flask te
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (EMERGENCE). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): Pipeline self-improvement observation remains NOVEL: This is a meta-observation about pipeline behavior across specimens (BlueEdge → NetBox), not a specimen structural claim. Reconciliation requires cross-specimen evidence comparison which is outside per-specimen reconciliation scope. Assessed for reconciliation and found not reconcilable from NetBox evidence alone.

semantic_propositions.proposition: Structural surprise (TOPOLOGY): Dual structural authority — import graph vs inheritance graph reveal different hierarchies. Import authority: dcim dominates (189 cross-domain edges) — vocabulary/data coupling. Inheritance authority:
semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Semantic grounding of hero moment (TOPOLOGY). Cross-referenced with CEU evidence. Reconciliation (PI.SUBSTRATE.HERO-MOMENT-RECONCILIATION.01): Dual structural authority directly cross-validated: 12 enriched AUTHORITY_TOPOLOGY propositions at DIRECT_EVIDENCE tier (0.841 mean) confirm categorized authority composition across all CEUs. Import authority: DCIM dominates (confirmed by COUPLING_PATTERN). Framework authority: DCIM dominates in total edges (444), but authority enrichment reveals 8/12 CEUs are VIEW-dominant with full-stack profiles — confirming that inheritance authority is structurally distinct from import authority. CEU-IPAM (MODEL-dominant, zero VIEW) and CEU-UTILITIES (FORM-dominant) demonstrate the divergence this hero moment identified.
